'''Rayt''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who resembled like a shorter, fatter [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. He lived and worked on [[StarForge Station]] and had a [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] copilot. Six months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] he was responsible for shipping [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] and [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] from [[Eiattu 6]] to [[Leonia Tavira]]. Solo and [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] would later discover this fact despite Rayt's denials.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 30|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 30]] {{1st}}
